content.en:
After leaving from Guheng Mountain, Ye Tian kept hurrying.

Along the way, nothing happened, and no Origin Realm would attack him.

Therefore, he came to the eastern part of the Eternal Shore to meet the Origin Black River very safely.

After he came here, there were still other geniuses on the other side who did not return.

Therefore, he waited silently with the Lord of the White Capital.

Once all the thirty-six Peer-level geniuses have arrived, they will be sent to Wind Tooth Island.

The waiting process was a bit boring, so some of the other side level geniuses tried to chat with the Lord of the White Capital.

And the lord of the white capital was also very kind, and they all answered one by one.

Then.

A Shore-level genius asked, "Lord of the White Capital, how is the strength of our Wind Tooth Island?"

The other other shore-level geniuses looked over one after another, and they were also very curious.

They only knew that the strength of Wind Tooth Island was terrifying, and even the Tai Chaos Domain was not worth mentioning in front of Wind Tooth Island.

But what the specific strength is, they can't say.

Now, they are about to enter Wind Tooth Island, and they are naturally more curious about this issue.

The Lord of the White Capital smiled and said, "Anyway, you're all about to enter Wind Tooth Island, so it's okay to tell you." Our Fengya Island is actually not an island, but a group of islands on the Origin Black River, and each island has an island owner. The lowest strength of each island owner is the top Origin Middle Realm. If you take the Lord of Chaos as an example, the Lord of Chaos is considered medium among those island masters. "

"What, the Lord of Chaos can only be regarded as a medium !!!"

These other side level geniuses were extremely shocked.

Even Ye Tian was extremely surprised, he was originally a Lord of Chaos who was not very powerful on Wind Tooth Island, but at least he could be ranked in a good strength.

But I never expected that the Lord of Chaos was not the top in Wind Tooth Island.

"Don't be so surprised!" said the Lord of the White Capital, "The water on the other side of Eternity is very deep, and you have not seen much, so it is very surprising. In fact, whether it is east, west, south, or north in the land of eternity, it is dispensable. Not to mention compared to the central region, even some forces close to the central region, such as our Fengya Island, do not take the eastern part of the country seriously. "

"There is only one top-notch Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor like the Lord of Chaos in the east, and Wind Tooth Island now has nearly a hundred top-level Origin Middle Realm Island Masters, and there are even more top-level geniuses in the Origin Lower Realm. "

"Not only that, but there are also three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island!"

As soon as they heard that there were only three Heavenly Ancestors in the Origin Upper Realm on Wind Tooth Island, many other level geniuses were surprised.

They still thought that such a powerful Wind Tooth Island had a lot of Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors!

"Lord of the White Capital, are there only three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island?"

They asked curiously.

"Yes, there are only three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors!" "The Lord of the White Capital said with a smile: "You can't imagine the difficulty of becoming the Origin Upper Realm, and there is a high probability that you, the other side level geniuses, will not be able to become the Origin Upper Realm. The difficulty of breaking through the Origin Lower Realm, Middle Realm, and Upper Realm is not one dimension, the gap is too big!"

The Lord of the White Capital didn't elaborate on the difficulty of breaking through, but Ye Tian could imagine it.

Fengya Island only has a side-level genius, so almost all of them are other-level geniuses, but so many other-level geniuses have only given birth to three Origin Upper Realms, you can imagine its difficulty.

Of course.

Even if it becomes the top Origin Middle Realm, it is still very remarkable, and it can almost be regarded as invincible in the east.

Time passes slowly.

After a period of time, all thirty-six other-level geniuses arrived.

"Gone!"

The Lord of the White Capital made many other shore-level geniuses stand on the Origin Kun Beast.

And then.

Airplanes!

The Origin Kun Beast entered the Origin Black River and shuttled towards Wind Tooth Island.

The speed of the Origin Kun Beast was very fast, but it also shuttled for a long time before it arrived at Wind Tooth Island.

And just as we were about to arrive at Wind Tooth Island, a breeze surrounded Wind Tooth Island.

Then.

The Lord of the White Capital reminded: "Don't touch these winds, these winds seem to be very ordinary, but if you touch them, they can blow your flesh to pieces in an instant, and this power is not something you can resist!

"Understood!"

Thirty-six other shore-level geniuses responded one after another.

"Even the Nine Bone Transformation Realm's other shore level geniuses can't withstand the breeze here, which is a bit similar to the wind in the ruins on the other side. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the ruins on the other side, when he encountered the wind, he was also blown by the wind, and his body was directly shattered.

And now, his strength is far greater than before, although he can resist for a while, but he will also suffer heavy losses.

And here, it can make the Nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level genius fall in an instant, which is obviously more terrifying than the wind in the ruins on the other side!

The Origin Kun Beast is the Origin Realm, and it is very special, so it directly penetrates the Wind Zone and enters the range of Wind Tooth Island.

Then.

Many other shore-level geniuses have really seen Fengya Island.

Below.

The islands sit on top of the Origin Black River, and the Origin Black River here is very calm, unlike the rough waves of the Origin Black River in other regions.

"It should be the wind area that makes this place very calm, similar to the storm core area is very calm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

These islands are in the shape of a crescent moon and look very strange.

Wow!

The Origin Kunmon landed directly on one of the islands.

Then.

The lord of Baidu said: "This is Baidu Island, and I am the owner of Baidu Island! Fengya Island and others will also test your various conditions, and after the test, one island master will come over and select you." Once you have been chosen, you will join an island and become a member of an island. If you have enough strength in the future, you can become the new owner. "

"Lord of the White Capital, is the treatment different for different islands?"

A peer-level genius asked.

"Of course it's different!" the Lord of the White Capital said, "The basic treatment is the same, but there are additional benefits for different islands. Some island owners are weaker and have fewer resources, so naturally the treatment given is naturally slightly worse. "

"Lord of the White Capital, which island owners give good treatment?" another genius from the other side asked.

However, the lord of the white capital did not answer, "It is not you who choose the island owner, but the island owner who chooses you, remember? Therefore, there is no point in you asking so much." "

Seeing this, the other other shore-level geniuses did not continue to ask.
